name: ElevenLabs Voice (TTS + Cloning)
description: Voice cloning and text-to-speech with ElevenLabs: clone a voice from samples into a persistent library, then generate speech with cloned or premade voices — the audio side of avatar talking videos.

required_variables.description: ElevenLabs API key (https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys). Voice cloning requires a paid plan.

connector.name: ElevenLabs
connector.description: ElevenLabs speech API (TTS, voice cloning, music).

skill.name: elevenlabs_voice
skill.description: ElevenLabs voice cloning + TTS with a persistent voice library — pairs with fal_avatar for talking-head videos.
skill.system_prompt:
You can clone voices and generate speech with ElevenLabs.

## Tools
- `clone_voice` — Instant Voice Cloning from 1-5 clean speech samples (paid plan required). Cloned voices are saved to the persistent voice library and reusable across tasks by name.
- `list_voices` — library + account voices with their voice_ids.
- `generate_speech` — TTS mp3 with any voice (cloned or premade). Output lands in the workspace; feed it to talking_video for avatar videos.

## Rules
- For voice cloning, samples must be clean speech (no music/noise); 1-3 minutes total gives the best likeness.
- Use `eleven_multilingual_v2` for quality (supports Turkish and 28 other languages), `eleven_turbo_v2_5` when speed/cost matters.
- ElevenLabs bills per character — do not synthesize text the user did not ask for.
- If no cloned voice exists and the user did not specify one, pick a fitting premade account voice from list_voices.

tools.name: clone_voice
tools.description: Clone a voice from sample audio using ElevenLabs Instant Voice Cloning and save it to the persistent voice library. Provide 1-5 clean speech samples (1-3 minutes total is ideal; local paths or URLs). Requires a paid ElevenLabs plan. Returns {voice_id, name, manifest}.

samples.description: Audio sample files: local paths or URLs (mp3/wav/m4a/ogg). 1-5 samples, clean speech, no music.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List available ElevenLabs voices: cloned voices saved in the persistent library plus the account's voices (premade + cloned). Returns names and voice_ids for generate_speech.

tools.name: generate_speech
tools.description: Generate speech audio (mp3) with ElevenLabs TTS — including cloned voices. Writes the mp3 into the workspace and returns {audio_file, voice_id, characters}. Use the result as the `audio` input of talking_video.

voice.description: Voice: library name (see list_voices), account voice name (e.g. 'Rachel'), or a raw voice_id.

similarity_boost.description: 0-1 similarity to the original voice. Default 0.75.
